content.text: Now I'll write all 7 files in parallel.

All 7 files have been created successfully. Here is a summary of what was created:

### API Routes (3 files)

1. **`C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\src\app\api\stripe\checkout\route.ts`** -- Stripe checkout session creation endpoint. Accepts POST requests with `priceId`, `plan`, and `interval` parameters. Validates the user session via Supabase, looks up the organization and its Stripe customer ID, resolves the correct price ID from the `PLANS` constants, and creates a Stripe checkout session with success/cancel redirect URLs back to the billing settings page.

2. **`C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\src\app\api\stripe\webhook\route.ts`** -- Stripe webhook handler. Uses a Supabase admin client (service role key) since there is no user session during webhook calls. Handles three event types:
   - `checkout.session.completed` -- Links Stripe customer/subscription to the organization, determines the plan from the price ID, and updates quotas.
   - `customer.subscription.updated` -- Updates the plan period end date.
   - `customer.subscription.deleted` -- Downgrades the organization back to the free plan with free-tier quotas.

3. **`C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\src\app\api\stripe\portal\route.ts`** -- Stripe billing portal session creation. Allows existing customers to manage their subscription, payment methods, and invoices through Stripe's hosted portal. Validates the user has an organization with a Stripe customer ID before creating the session.

### Dashboard Settings Pages (4 files)

4. **`C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\src\app\(dashboard)\dashboard\settings\page.tsx`** -- General profile settings. Displays the user's avatar, full name, and email. Full name is editable and saved back to the `profiles` table; email is shown as read-only.

5. **`C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\src\app\(dashboard)\dashboard\settings\team\page.tsx`** -- Team management page. Lists all members of the user's organization in a table with avatars, names, emails, and role badges. Includes an "Invite Member" dialog with email input and role selection (member/admin).

6. **`C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\src\app\(dashboard)\dashboard\settings\billing\page.tsx`** -- Billing and subscription management. Shows the current plan with pricing, document and survey usage progress bars, a "Manage Billing" button (for existing Stripe customers), and upgrade cards for Pro ($29/month) and Enterprise ($99/month) when on the free plan.

7. **`C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\src\app\(dashboard)\dashboard\settings\api-keys\page.tsx`** -- API key management page. Gates access behind the Pro plan (shows an upgrade prompt for free users). For Pro/Enterprise users, provides a full CRUD interface: create keys with client-side SHA-256 hashing (only the hash is stored, the raw key is shown once), list keys with prefixes, and delete keys. Keys use the `nxai_` prefix format.
